subcodes.first_line: Thou didst make mention of the Trusted One and the remittance of funds. In reply let it be mentioned that His honor the Trusted One, upon him be the Glory of God, although [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر امین و حواله وجه نموده بودید در جواب ذکر شود جناب امین علیه بهآء الله اگر چه
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @business; financial; property matters
